# Clicker Universe

> Multi-tenant SaaS platform for local businesses. Each tenant gets a public biolink/website, admin dashboard, and optional add-on modules (POS, Inventory, Reservations, Membership, AI Agent).

## Docs

- [Architecture](ARCHITECTURE.md): System architecture and monorepo structure
- [Tech Stack](TECHSTACK.md): Approved technologies and what NOT to introduce
- [Conventions](CONVENTIONS.md): Coding conventions and patterns
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Agents Guide](AGENTS.md): AI agent instructions (build, test, style, rules)
- [Deep Architecture](clicker-platform-v2/Docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Full technical architecture reference

## Apps

- [clicker-platform-v2/](clicker-platform-v2/README.md): Main Next.js platform
- [auth-gateway/](auth-gateway/): Centralized authentication
- [backyard/](backyard/): Super-admin dashboard
- [functions/](functions/): Firebase Cloud Functions

## Key Concepts

- **Multi-tenancy**: All data scoped under `sites/{siteId}` in Firestore
- **Module system**: Opt-in features toggled per tenant; modules cannot import each other
- **RBAC**: Roles (owner/editor/viewer/staff) enforced via `useUser().canEdit()`
- **Templates**: 5 prebuilt public-facing themes per tenant
